title: Monsoon 2026 LIVE: Heavy rains lash parts of Kerala; IMD issues orange alert in three districts - ODISHA RAY
article_text:
Odisha government launches special Odia language training for employees
Monsoon 2026 LIVE: Heavy rains 
lash parts of Kerala; IMD issues 
orange alert in three districts
Monsoon expected to hit Odisha between June 8 and 12
Centre Approves Rs 8,300  crore for key Odisha coastal highway stretch
DRDO, IAF successfully flight-test 
indigenous RudraM-II air-to-surface 
missile
